# fileSystemPath

**Instance Property**

The item’s file system path on a camera using the mass storage transport type.

## Declaration

```swift
var fileSystemPath: String? { get }
```

## Discussion

This property is set for cameras whose [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICDevice/transportType] is [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICDeviceTransport/transportTypeMassStorage].

## Locating an Item

- **device**: The item’s parent device.
- **parentFolder**: This item’s parent folder.
- **isInTemporaryStore**: A Boolean value that indicates whether this item is in a temporary store.

items.description: A Boolean value that indicates whether this item is in a temporary store.
items.name: isInTemporaryStore
